# Part Updates (20210301)

```sql
SELECT [PartID]
      ,[status]
      ,[planner_user_id]
      ,[wostatus]
      ,[type]
      ,[baseid]
      ,[lot]
      ,[split]
      ,[sub]
      ,[createdate]
      ,[lastclosedate]
      ,[timelapse]
  FROM [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[Update20210301]
--truncate table [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[Update20210301]

/*
UPDATE LIVE.dbo.PART
SET STATUS = 'O'
FROM LIVE.dbo.PART P
INNER JOIN [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[Update20210301] U
ON P.ID = U.PARTID

UPDATE LIVE.dbo.PART_SITE
SET STATUS = 'O'
FROM LIVE.dbo.PART_SITE P
INNER JOIN [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[Update20210301] U
ON P.PART_ID = U.PARTID
*/

SELECT P.ID, P.[STATUS]
FROM LIVE.dbo.PART P
INNER JOIN [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[Update20210301] U
ON P.ID = U.PARTID
WHERE P.[STATUS] != 'O'

SELECT P.PART_ID, P.[STATUS]
FROM LIVE.dbo.PART_SITE P
INNER JOIN [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[Update20210301] U
ON P.PART_ID = U.PARTID
WHERE P.[STATUS] != 'O'
```
